title: JED - JSON Expanded Data for a work
description: JSON data model for bibliographic data describing works. It is based on both danMARC2 and DKABM data, and the origin of data right now also refers to internal Corepo fields. The data model is approximately 80% the same as the JED that is exposed in the FBI-API, as there are some variations for practical reasons.

exportTime.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the work was exported from Corepo

titles.description: Different kinds of titles for this work

main.description: The main title(s) of the work, - array because some publications contain more than one work

full.description: The full title(s) of the work including subtitles etc.
full.origin: Marc field 245 excluding subfield ø / DKABM dc:title dkdcplus:full

parallel.description: Titles (in other languages) parallel to the main title of the work

tvSeries.description: The individual title elements if the publication is a tv-series (season/episode/disc etc)

creators.description: Creators of the work i.e. primary authors, illustrators, directors, composers etc.

dk5MainEntry.description: DK5 classification, main entry for this work

display.description: A display string with the classification code and a possible subject related to the 'code'.
display.origin: The value of 'code' + the value of 'subject'.

dk5Heading.description: The DK5 subject heading for the classification code
dk5Heading.origin: Heading from the DK5 classification system / DKABM dc:subject xsi:type='dkdcplus:DK5-Text'

universe.description: Literary/movie universe this work is part of, e.g. Wizarding World, Marvel Universe

dbcVerified.description: Only DBC verified subjects for this work, based on subjects from all manifestations in this work

all.description: All subjects for this work, based on subjects from all manifestations in this work

genreAndForm.description: The genre and (literary) form of this work

firstPublicationDate.description: The publication date of the earliest manifestation in this work
firstPublicationDate.origin: The oldest publication date in this work based on edition.publicationDateForRanking

latestPublicationDate.description: The publication date of the latest manifestation in this work
latestPublicationDate.origin: The newest publication date in this work based on edition.publicationDateForRanking

manifestations.description: Manifestations in this work, based on the work clusters in Corepo

bestRepresentations.description: Sorted array of pid's for each manifestation from all, where best is at [0] and least best is at the end of the array. Newer is better. Records from DBC or KB are considered better. MaterialType.specific 'bog', 'music (cd)', and 'film (dvd)' are also considered better

first.description: Pid of the oldest manifestation in this work based on publication year, if more with same publication year then oldest record creation date

latest.description: Pid of the newest manifestation in this work based on publication year, if more with same publication year then newest record creation date

order.description: Sorted array of pid's for each manifestation from all, where newest is at [0] and oldest is at the end of the array.

mostRelevant.description: Sorted array of pid's of selected manifestations from all, where only the best representation for each corepo unit in a work is selected. If the agency that asks for mostRelevant manifestations has their own record in a specific corepo unit, then that is selected instead of the best representation

all.description: All manifestations of this work. Some change.
